name: Hook
description: JSON Structure description of the Gitea Hook entity.

active.description: Whether the webhook is active and will be triggered

authorization_header.description: Authorization header to include in webhook requests

branch_filter.description: Branch filter pattern to determine which branches trigger the webhook

events.description: List of events that trigger this webhook

id.description: The unique identifier of the webhook

name.description: Optional human-readable name for the webhook

type.description: The type of the webhook (e.g., gitea, slack, discord)
